button.label: Button
button.description: Which gamepad button's pressed state to forward as a Bool.

invert.label: Invert
invert.description: If true, the published Bool is the *negation* of the button's pressed state.

emit_only_on_change.label: Emit Only on Change
emit_only_on_change.description: If true, only publish when the value actually changes (edge-triggered). If false, every incoming buttons message produces an output.
